background: The Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance System monitors six categories of health behaviors in U.S. youth and adolescents. Many types of behaviors that contribute to adverse health consequences are monitored.

task.query: What is the proportion of high school students who had ridden with a driver who had been drinking alcohol during the preceding 30-day period?
What is the proportion of high school students who had smoked cigarettes?
What is the proportion of high school students who were overweight?
